feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Your Mom
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,461Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: A Tuesday night at Clark’s apartment was supposed to be a normal, human affair—complete with a strict ban on superpowers in the kitchen and Clark stubbornly trying to prove he can cook. But when Bruce nonchalantly reveals who he’s been intensely texting all evening, Clark's world is turned upside down.   As it turns out, Gotham's dark vigilante and Martha Kent have been secret text-buddies for six months, trading gardening tips, recipes, and embarrassing stories about Clark. Over a bowl of "cheated" homemade ice cream, Clark is left drowning in pure, overwhelming affection for his brilliant, guarded boyfriend—who, despite all his brooding, simply cannot say no to Mrs. Kent.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Curse of Lady Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: NeptonicMistakes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,669Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Gotham has a cryptid that has been roaming its streets, protecting its city, for nearly 200 years. Jimmy wants to solve the mystery of who this cryptid is and drags Clark with him. What happens with Clark discovers things about it that no one has ever. What happens when he realizes there is something hidden but human about it? ---- This is gonna be another long fic! One that will even be Multi-Media (with fanart, mock articles and journal entries)! There might be smut at some point (sep chapter from the rest and marked, able to skip it and not miss major plot)!

entry.title: Out of Line
entry.summary:
Author: qmodo

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 203Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Bruce holds multiple lifetimes worth of emotional and physical scars. Damian entering his life filled deep voids, and his passing created new ones. Never taking the time to process his pain, Bruce lashes out at those closest to him, leaving Diana and Clark to lovingly put him in his place.

entry.title: come as you are
entry.summary:
Author: thefuzzzz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,649Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Someone at the Daily Planet wrote a hate piece on Bruce Wayne. Clark read the whole thing at his kitchen table with his glasses on and a red pen in hand. He found one spelling mistake, three possible grammar mistakes, five complete falsities, and three hundred words of utter bull crap. He didn’t personally know Mr. Wayne, but he’d been to several charity galas and been in the same room as him. He was ditzy, self indulgent, and possibly shallow to his core, sure. He was, however, not ill intentioned, money hungry, or disregarding of others. He had multiple adopted children and held charity galas for every organization under Earth’s yellow sun, for God’s sake. Clark couldn’t stand bad journalism. So, he set out to right this wrong.——————Or, Clark discovers some interesting facts about billionaire, philanthropist, (holy cow, very attractive) Bruce Wayne

entry.title: starstruck
entry.summary:
Author: craycr4y

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,360Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 1,043

Summary: A loud bang shuts down Hal’s train of thoughts, his head swivels towards its direction, wondering if Batman had finally deigned to show up. But it wasn’t him. Instead, the person who shows up is decked out in red and blue; black lines stretch across his suit and meet at his chest to form a symbol of a… spider? Huh. Did Batman change themes? or Spider-Man & Batman are best friends. No, the Justice League doesn't know that. And if you ask Bruce, they never should.Until they do.

entry.title: leave no trace
entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 106,019Chapters: 18/19Kudos: 1,196

Summary: For Superbat Week 2024: Day 6 Firefighter Clark & Dr. Bruce. Clark Kent has been Tower 344’s fire lookout for the last decade. When a camper is injured in the remote woods, he ends up with an unexpected house guest while they wait for the next available medical evacuation.

entry.title: Kinæsthesia
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,511Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 161

Summary: "You are your own worst enemy."- Martha Kent Clark comes home to a city still wearing his symbol like a wound. Bruce comes home to Clark. It takes both of them longer than it should. Features: an opinionated elderly neighbor, a neighborhood that gives a damn, a word in Kryptonian that doesn't translate cleanly, and two men who are catastrophically bad at being afraid in front of each other. The longer version: After the Fortress, after the city's grief and the shaharreth on every wall, Clark Kent comes back to Metropolis and tries to figure out what home means for someone like him. Bruce Wayne is apparently part of that answer. Clark is working on accepting this. This is a story about the specific courage of choosing someone who will die before you do. About the difference between happiness and contentment. About the people who show up for you in your building hallway at six in the morning and the people who put a transponder in your cape because they can't say I was afraid for you any other way. Martha Kent called it. She usually does.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Month in the Life (of Clark Kent)
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,573Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 80

Summary: Clark Kent has been maintaining a careful separation between his identities for three years. Bruce Wayne has been maintaining emotional distance from everything for fifteen. On Monday, they prevent an interdimensional collapse together and accidentally reveal their secret identities to each other. On Tuesday, they have their first date. On Wednesday, they go viral. This is Week One. (Or: Clark Kent has four voices arguing in his head at all times, Bruce Wayne conducts tactical analysis on his own feelings, and neither of them is prepared for what happens when an alien who can hear heartbeats falls in love with a human who thinks emotions are a tactical liability. 30 days. Compressed timeline. Everything is on fire.)

entry.summary:
Author: babybluecontinental

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,291Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 68

Summary: Clark Kent needs a new job. Disabled, reclusive, and depressed billionaire Bruce Wayne needs a friend, though he’d never admit it. Alfred Pennyworth thinks the two should live together so they both get what they need and so he can finally retire. They get more.

entry.title: The Door Left Open
entry.summary:
Author: xanthoszephyrus644

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,952Chapters: 14/184Kudos: 14

Summary: When a Luthor trap puts Batman in a room he cannot think his way out of, the Justice Leaguelearns there are older rooms still locked inside him. A story about the kind of damage recordsdo not hold, the people who refuse to look away, and what it costs Bruce Wayne to be cared foron purpose. Tags: Bruce/Clark slow burn; found family; trauma recovery; referenced past abuse;hurt/comfort; Justice League ensemble; Batfamily; consent; memory loss; mind control; non-graphic past sexual abuse references. Reading order note —Numbered chapters are concurrent threads - what other people were doing during the main sceneor what the villains were building while the family recovered. Interludes are quieter close-upsbetween beats. Read straight through; skipping interludes is ok but some will be highly impactful to plot as a heads up! Book one of two. This volume closes the door it opened on Bruce — the healing, the family, thelove — and leaves one other door standing open, because some lessons outlive the people whotaught them, and someone patient is still waiting on the other side.

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,007Chapters: 12/29Kudos: 143

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: A Blue Sky And Four Ducks
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,354Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 226

Summary: Bruce is supposed to be the world’s greatest detective, a creature of the night, and a master of keeping secrets. However, none of those titles hold up against a heavy post-surgery dose of hospital painkillers. When Clark walks into the recovery room, he finds a brilliantly loopy, incredibly high Batman who is currently having a profound emotional affair with a navy necktie. As Clark tries to keep Bruce from loudly shouting their secret identities to the entire hospital wing, Bruce lets him in on a few top-secret classified secrets: 1) He slept with Superman (and highly approves of his assets), 2) He is going to marry Superman one day, and 3) They are buying a farm with exactly four strategically balanced ducks. Clark is just trying to survive the sheer, blushing embarrassment of it all, while secretly melting into a puddle of pure happiness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
